releaseNotes: 完整修复 Codex 浅色与深色皮肤的语义配色、重复遮罩和可读性问题；模型触发器、模型/推理强度/速度多级菜单、权限、发送与停止控件现在都会跟随皮肤，并同步更新皮肤制作 Skill。
releaseNotesEn: Fixes Codex light/dark semantic colors, duplicate overlays, and readability. The model trigger, nested model/reasoning/speed menus, permission, send, and stop controls now follow the selected skin, with matching Skin Skill guidance.
